message:
fix(beta_feedback_loop): clear last_decision on rollback to prevent stale advance

rollback_stage() did not clear last_decision, allowing advance_stage()
to succeed after a rollback if the previous evaluation was Promote —
bypassing the gate that requires fresh evaluation before stage transitions.

Added advance_blocked_after_rollback test covering the exact scenario.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
